page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6i.24xlarge is a bare-metal, GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors on the x86_64 architecture, with a one-to-one thread-to-core ratio. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance bundles four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 64 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 30 Gbps, managed under a KVM hypervisor.

Given the high density of dedicated Intel Xeon cores and multiple NVIDIA T4 GPUs, this instance offers a specialized hardware profile for parallel processing tasks. It is qualitatively positioned as a high-resource platform where the cost is aligned with multi-GPU acceleration and dedicated compute resources. Appropriate workloads include GPU-accelerated machine learning inference, video transcoding, parallel compute tasks, and distributed database operations requiring dedicated CPU allocation and high network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6i.24xlarge is an x86_64 bare-metal server configured with 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores and 384.0 GB of system memory. The instance features a dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core, ensuring consistent compute performance. For parallel processing and acceleration, it bundles four NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing a total of 64 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor. The hardware profile is qualitatively optimized for workloads requiring multi-GPU acceleration and high CPU core density without the need for local NVMe drives. It is suited for machine learning inference, distributed data processing, video encoding, and high-throughput compute workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6i.24xlarge is a bare-metal server with 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing 64 GB VRAM for accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6i.24xlarge features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, and 30 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU bare-metal platform featuring ninety-six Intel Xeon cores and four NVIDIA T4 accelerators for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores with single-thread execution
Four bundled NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM
384.0 GB of system memory delivering 4.0 GB per core
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under KVM virtualization
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations
Designed for machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallel computing
